r_ktm_return_overdue_nest_coll.sql: SELECT pka_com_function.fp_form( pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) ,'XXX-XXX' ) as coll_group_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no
